title: tf.image.extract_patches  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Extractpatchesfromimages.
This op collects patches from the input image, as if applying a
convolution. All extracted patches are stacked in the depth (last) dimension
of the output.
Specifically, the op extracts patches of shapesizeswhich arestridesapart in the input image. The output is subsampled using theratesargument,
in the same manner as "atrous" or "dilated" convolutions.

parameters.description:
Theargument has no effect on the size of each patch, it determines
how many patches are extracted. IfVALID, only patches which are fully
contained in the input image are included. IfSAME, all patches
